entities.description: conventional rag is described as the most common pipeline for document analysis involving text extraction and chunking
bm25 is identified as a strong and widely used retrieval model selected for implementation
vanilla rag is identified as a strong and widely used retrieval model selected for implementation
layout vanilla is a variant of vanilla rag that utilizes document layout analysis for semantic chunking
document analysis is the general task where raw text is extracted and processed in the described pipeline
raw text is the input material that is first extracted in the pipeline
segments are the chunks of specified size that the raw text is divided into
document layout analysis is the technique used by layout vanilla for semantic chunking
semantic chunking is the process of dividing text into segments based on meaning  utilized by layout vanilla

relations.description: conventional rag is the pipeline where bm25 is selected as a retrieval model
conventional rag is the pipeline where vanilla rag is selected as a retrieval model
layout vanilla is a variant that builds upon vanilla rag by adding document layout analysis
layout vanilla is implemented as part of the conventional rag pipeline described in the text
